acrylamide.description: Michael acceptor commonly used for cysteine targeting

cyanoacrylamide.description: Tunable reversible covalent warhead related to acrylamides

chloroacetamide.description: Alkylating warhead often reactive toward cysteine

aldehyde.description: Carbonyl warhead that can form reversible covalent interactions

boronic_acid.description: Warhead often used for serine protease inhibition
